title: Archon + Jira: Drag a Ticket, Get a Pull Request (Live Build)
summary: Cole Medin demonstrates building a Jira adapter for Archon that automatically triggers AI coding workflows from Jira tickets. The system integrates with GitHub, Slack, Telegram, and Discord to create pull requests and post results back to tickets.
